productDisplayName: Crocs Women Abf Single Flip Slippers
description: If you expect your footwear to be extremely comfortable coupled with great looks, you've come to the right place! These flip flops from crocs pamper your feet all day long as you go about doing your daily chores with even greater enthusiasm. This close-to-barefoot footwear can be paired with just about any kind of casual wear for a fab look.UpperThong straps made of Croslite material for maximum comfort and styleBrand name on end of strapMidsoleCroslite footbed designed with an ergonomic FitFull-moulded design for lightweight comfort and better cushioingBrand logo embossed on footbedOutsoleNon-marking, slip-resistant Croslite outsoleRaised contoured pads with grooves for shock absorption and improved comfortshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
